title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 630.830 - Transfer of patient, duty of administrator
text:
630.830.  Transfer of patient, duty of administrator. — The compact administrator is hereby directed to consult with the immediate family of any proposed transferee and, in the case of a proposed transferee from an institution in this state to an institution in another party state, to take no final action without approval of the court which committed the proposed transferee.
(L. 1980 H.B. 1724)
